title: amphitecna loreae
intro: Amphitecna loreae, also known as the Mexican evening primrose, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Onagraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), which is a polyunsaturated fatty acid that has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Amphitecna loreae include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with conditions such as eczema, arthritis, and menopausal hot flashes. Herbal preparations of Amphitecna loreae include oil extracts, capsules, and topical creams that are used to support skin health and reduce inflammation.
